rulings.Case Title: WAYNE RUNNESTRAND et al VS. HONEYWELL INTERNATIONAL, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication, By Defendant Gencorp Inc.
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 18, 2014 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant GenCorp. Inc.'s motion for summary judgment or, in the alternative, summary adjudication is continued on the court's own motion to March 19, 2014. = (503/TLJ)
